h1: Free because the move should start before the checkout page.
textSample: LocateFlow Features Why free Pricing Help Blog FAQ Sign In Get started WHY IT IS FREE Free because the move should start before the checkout page. Consumers can organize a move at no cost, while optional partner, concierge, and business surfaces can support the platform without locking the core workflow behind a paywall. $0 for the core move The consumer product is positioned around a free move workflow: address organization, provider tracking, reminders, checklists, and guides. Optional partner economics If a user chooses an eligible provider or future partner offer, LocateFlow may earn a referral. The user can still complete the move without taking an offer. No hidden account action LocateFlow does not secretly update accounts, sell a completed action, or pretend to be a provider. The us
title: Why Free | LocateFlow
